mapper.select: SELECT RULE_ID AS "ruleId", REQUEST_ID AS "requestId", IP_ADDRESS AS "ipAddress", ACCESS_SCOPE AS "accessScope", DESCRIPTION AS "description", DESCRIPTION_EN AS "descriptionEn", OWNER AS "owner", OWNER_EN AS "ownerEn", STATUS AS "status", TO_CHAR(UPDATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "updatedAt", MEMO AS "memo", MEMO_EN AS "memoEn", TO_CHAR(EXPIRES_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "expiresAt" FROM COMTNIPWHITELISTRULE WHERE COALESCE(USE_AT, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY UPDATED_AT DESC, RULE_ID DESC

SELECT REQUEST_ID AS "requestId", RULE_ID AS "ruleId", IP_ADDRESS AS "ipAddress", ACCESS_SCOPE AS "accessScope", REASON AS "reason", REASON_EN AS "reasonEn", APPROVAL_STATUS AS "approvalStatus", APPROVAL_STATUS_EN AS "approvalStatusEn", TO_CHAR(REQUESTED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "requestedAt", REQUESTER AS "requester", REQUESTER_EN AS "requesterEn", REVIEW_NOTE AS "reviewNote", TO_CHAR(REVIEWED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "reviewedAt", REVIEWED_BY AS "reviewedBy", REVIEWED_BY_EN AS "reviewedByEn", TO_CHAR(EXPIRES_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "expiresAt", MEMO AS "memo", MEMO_EN AS "memoEn" FROM COMTNIPWHITELISTREQUEST WHERE COALESCE(USE_AT, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY REQUESTED_AT DESC, REQUEST_ID DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMTNIPWHITELISTRULE ( RULE_ID, REQUEST_ID, IP_ADDRESS, ACCESS_SCOPE, DESCRIPTION, DESCRIPTION_EN, OWNER, OWNER_EN, STATUS, UPDATED_AT, MEMO, MEMO_EN, EXPIRES_AT, USE_AT, FRST_REGISTER_ID, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, LAST_UPDUSR_ID, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM ) VALUES ( #{ruleId}, CASE WHEN #{requestId} IS NULL OR #{requestId} = '' THEN NULL ELSE #{requestId} END, #{ipAddress}, #{accessScope}, #{description}, #{descriptionEn}, #{owner}, #{ownerEn}, #{status}, CASE WHEN #{updatedAt} IS NULL OR #{updatedAt} = '' THEN CURRENT_DATETIME ELSE TO_DATETIME(#{updatedAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') END, #{memo}, #{memoEn}, CASE WHEN #{expiresAt} IS NULL OR #{expiresAt} = '' THEN NULL ELSE TO_DATETIME(#{expiresAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') END, 'Y', COALESCE(#{owner}, 'system'), CURRENT_DATETIME, COALESCE(#{owner}, 'system'), CURRENT_DATETIME )
mapper.update: UPDATE COMTNIPWHITELISTRULE SET REQUEST_ID = CASE WHEN #{requestId} IS NULL OR #{requestId} = '' THEN NULL ELSE #{requestId} END, IP_ADDRESS = #{ipAddress}, ACCESS_SCOPE = #{accessScope}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, DESCRIPTION_EN = #{descriptionEn}, OWNER = #{owner}, OWNER_EN = #{ownerEn}, STATUS = #{status}, UPDATED_AT = CASE WHEN #{updatedAt} IS NULL OR #{updatedAt} = '' THEN CURRENT_DATETIME ELSE TO_DATETIME(#{updatedAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') END, MEMO = #{memo}, MEMO_EN = #{memoEn}, EXPIRES_AT = CASE WHEN #{expiresAt} IS NULL OR #{expiresAt} = '' THEN NULL ELSE TO_DATETIME(#{expiresAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') END, LAST_UPDUSR_ID = COALESCE(#{owner}, LAST_UPDUSR_ID), LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = CURRENT_DATETIME WHERE RULE_ID = #{ruleId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMTNIPWHITELISTREQUEST ( REQUEST_ID, RULE_ID, IP_ADDRESS, ACCESS_SCOPE, REASON, REASON_EN, APPROVAL_STATUS, APPROVAL_STATUS_EN, REQUESTED_AT, REQUESTER, REQUESTER_EN, REVIEW_NOTE, REVIEWED_AT, REVIEWED_BY, REVIEWED_BY_EN, EXPIRES_AT, MEMO, MEMO_EN, USE_AT, FRST_REGISTER_ID, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, LAST_UPDUSR_ID, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM ) VALUES ( #{requestId}, CASE WHEN #{ruleId} IS NULL OR #{ruleId} = '' THEN NULL ELSE #{ruleId} END, #{ipAddress}, #{accessScope}, #{reason}, #{reasonEn}, #{approvalStatus}, #{approvalStatusEn}, CASE WHEN #{requestedAt} IS NULL OR #{requestedAt} = '' THEN CURRENT_DATETIME ELSE TO_DATETIME(#{requestedAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') END, #{requester}, #{requesterEn}, #{reviewNote}, CASE WHEN #{reviewedAt} IS NULL OR #{reviewedAt} = '' THEN NULL ELSE TO_DATETIME(#{reviewedAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') END, #{reviewedBy}, #{reviewedByEn}, CASE WHEN #{expiresAt} IS NULL OR #{expiresAt} = '' THEN NULL ELSE TO_DATETIME(#{expiresAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') END, #{memo}, #{memoEn}, 'Y', COALESCE(#{requester}, 'system'), CURRENT_DATETIME, COALESCE(#{reviewedBy}, #{requester}, 'system'), CURRENT_DATETIME )
mapper.update: UPDATE COMTNIPWHITELISTREQUEST SET RULE_ID = CASE WHEN #{ruleId} IS NULL OR #{ruleId} = '' THEN NULL ELSE #{ruleId} END, IP_ADDRESS = #{ipAddress}, ACCESS_SCOPE = #{accessScope}, REASON = #{reason}, REASON_EN = #{reasonEn}, APPROVAL_STATUS = #{approvalStatus}, APPROVAL_STATUS_EN = #{approvalStatusEn}, REQUESTED_AT = CASE WHEN #{requestedAt} IS NULL OR #{requestedAt} = '' THEN REQUESTED_AT ELSE TO_DATETIME(#{requestedAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') END, REQUESTER = #{requester}, REQUESTER_EN = #{requesterEn}, REVIEW_NOTE = #{reviewNote}, REVIEWED_AT = CASE WHEN #{reviewedAt} IS NULL OR #{reviewedAt} = '' THEN NULL ELSE TO_DATETIME(#{reviewedAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') END, REVIEWED_BY = #{reviewedBy}, REVIEWED_BY_EN = #{reviewedByEn}, EXPIRES_AT = CASE WHEN #{expiresAt} IS NULL OR #{expiresAt} = '' THEN NULL ELSE TO_DATETIME(#{expiresAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') END, MEMO = #{memo}, MEMO_EN = #{memoEn}, LAST_UPDUSR_ID = COALESCE(#{reviewedBy}, #{requester}, LAST_UPDUSR_ID), LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = CURRENT_DATETIME WHERE REQUEST_ID = #{requestId}
